title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 455.083 - Law enforcement officer may rely on copy of protection order
text:
455.083.  Law enforcement officer may rely on copy of protection order. — A law enforcement officer in this state may rely upon a copy of any order of protection issued under sections 455.010 to 455.085 or a certified foreign order of protection which has been provided to the peace officer from any source, in determining action to be taken pursuant to sections 455.080 and 455.085.
(L. 1995 H.B. 232 & 485, A.L. 1999 S.B. 1, et al.)
